THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARK, DONALD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 519 ELLIS STREET UNIT #205, SF, CA $3,093.66 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,093.66, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
